name: typesync
description: AI-native long-form document editor with CRDT multiplayer, offline-first, and inline AI

scripts.dev: concurrently "bun --cwd backend run dev" "bun --cwd frontend run dev"
scripts.build: bun --cwd frontend run build && bun --cwd backend run build
scripts.lint: bun --cwd frontend run lint && bun --cwd backend run lint
scripts.typecheck: bun --cwd frontend run typecheck && bun --cwd backend run typecheck
